title: homalium ceylanicum var. laoticum
intro: Homalium ceylanicum var. laoticum is a plant species, also known as the Laotian Homalium, which belongs to the family Salicaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Homalium ceylanicum var. laoticum is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and is traditionally used in folk medicine in Southeast Asia.
